title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.1147 - Civil and criminal liability, no immunity, when
text:
324.1147.  Civil and criminal liability, no immunity, when. — The provisions of sections 324.1100 to 324.1148 shall not be construed to release any person from civil liability or criminal prosecution under any other law of this state.
(L. 2010 H.B. 2226, et al.)
